regulations.title: Norwegian Carbon Tax Extension to Fisheries and Aquaculture
regulations.summary: Active from January 2026; Q1 payment ~NOK 800,000 due 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: Norwegian Pollution Control Act Amendment
regulations.summary: Norconsult feasibility study in progress; plan due Miljødirektoratet 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: EPS reuse programme planning underway; pilot target Q3 2026.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Feed supplier declarations pending; geolocation data expected February 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: DMA complete; ESRS E1, E3, E4, S2 material; Chilean hatchery labour audit initiated.
